# MPP Oracle

> A paid talking head that answers questions out loud. Pay $0.01 per question via Tempo MPP.

The Oracle is a public display — a 3D head that speaks answers to questions submitted by anyone. Questions are queued and answered one at a time. All connected viewers see and hear the same thing.

## API

Base URL: https://mpp-oracle.up.railway.app

### POST /api/ask

Submit a question to the Oracle. Requires MPP payment ($0.01 USDC via Tempo charge).

**Request:**
```json
{"question": "What is Bitcoin?"}
```

**Response:**
```json
{"ok": true}
```

The answer is broadcast to all viewers via WebSocket, not returned in the HTTP response. The 3D head speaks the answer with lip-synced audio.

**Payment:** $0.01 USDC per question (Tempo MPP charge intent).

**Example with tempo CLI:**
```bash
tempo request -X POST --json '{"question":"What is the meaning of life?"}' https://mpp-oracle.up.railway.app/api/ask
```

### GET /api/health

Health check. No payment required.

**Response:**
```json
{"ok": true, "queue": 0}
```

### WebSocket /ws

Connect to receive live broadcasts of questions and answers.

**Messages received:**
- `{"type":"queue","queue":[{"question":"...","wallet":"0x..."}]}` — current queue state
- `{"type":"active","question":"...","wallet":"0x..."}` — question being processed
- `{"type":"status","status":"thinking"}` — Oracle is generating answer
- `{"type":"answer","text":"..."}` — the answer text
- `{"type":"done"}` — processing complete
- `{"type":"error","message":"..."}` — error occurred
